title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness around Claude for large codebase work, implementing self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, Model Context Protocol, and subagents. The key finding is that the harness architecture matters more than the underlying model itself.
